headlines.description: Yoane Wissa and Bryan Mbeumo fired Brentford to a 3-0 win at Fulham in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbeumo double helps Brentford ease past Fulham

headlines.description: Liverpool survived Alexis Mac Allister's sending off to claim a comeback 3-1 win over Bournemouth in the Premier League at Anfield on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool survive red card to beat Bournemouth

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Wolverhampton Wanderers

headlines.description: Brighton went top of the Premier League table with a clinical 4-1 win at Wolves on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton go top after 4-1 thrashing at Wolves

headlines.description: New Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou celebrated his first home game in charge with a 2-0 victory over Manchester United on Saturday, thanks to Pape Matar Sarr's maiden Premier League goal and a late own goal by Lisandro Martinez.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs kick-start new era with win over Man Utd

headlines.description: A superb strike from Julián Álvarez off a Phil Foden assist gave Manchester City a 1-0 win over Newcastle United in their first home game of the Premier League season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Superb Foden inspires City win over Newcastle
